homepage.title: NumPals — Swipe, Count, Roar! Math App for Preschoolers
homepage.meta_description: NumPals is a TikTok-style math app for ages 3-5. Kids swipe through bite-sized lessons with animal characters to learn counting, addition & subtraction. No ads, no reading required.
h2_suggestions: Meet Your Child's New Animal Friends
Built for Tiny Fingers, Big Imaginations
Counting, Addition & Subtraction — No Reading Required
Screen Time You Won't Feel Guilty About
homepage.og_description: A TikTok-style math app where preschoolers learn counting, addition & subtraction by swiping through animal adventures. No ads. No reading required.
homepage.og_image_alt: NumPals app showing Sunny the Lion teaching addition with colorful numbers

features_page.title: How NumPals Works — Animal Characters Teach Math Through Play
features_page.meta_description: NumPals uses infinite scroll, sound-first design, and 5 lovable animal characters to teach preschoolers math. 64px touch targets, zero negative feedback, and full audio narration.
features_page.h1: Every Swipe Is a Mini Math Adventure
h2_suggestions: Built for Kids Who Can't Read Yet
Parent Dashboard for Peace of Mind

app_store_listing.subtitle: Swipe, Count, Roar! Learn math with animal friends.
app_store_listing.short_description: TikTok-style math for ages 3-5. Swipe through animal adventures to learn counting, addition & subtraction. No ads, no reading required, sound-first design.

structured_data.name: NumPals
structured_data.description: A TikTok-style infinite scroll math app for preschoolers featuring animal characters, audio narration, and play-based learning for counting, addition, and subtraction.
